auth.label: API Key
auth.description: MxToolbox API key UUID sent in the Authorization header. Find it under Settings > API in your account: https://knowledgebase.mxtoolbox.com/home/about-api.

actions.name: lookup_bimi_record
actions.description: Look up the BIMI record for a domain and return the official MxToolbox response payload.

domain.description: The bare domain whose BIMI record should be looked up, such as `example.com`.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for running a BIMI lookup with MxToolbox.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier for this lookup result.

ArgumentType.description: The type MxToolbox inferred for the lookup argument, such as domain or IP.

Command.description: The command that MxToolbox executed.

CommandArgument.description: The domain, IP address, host, or other target that MxToolbox queried.

TimeRecorded.description: The timestamp when MxToolbox recorded the lookup result.

anyOf.description: The reporting name server returned by MxToolbox for this lookup.

TimeToComplete.description: The lookup duration returned by MxToolbox, typically in milliseconds.

anyOf.description: A related IP address returned by MxToolbox when available.

ResourceRecordType.description: The numeric DNS resource record type returned by MxToolbox.

IsEmptySubDomain.description: Whether MxToolbox treated the lookup target as an empty subdomain.

IsTransitioned.description: Whether MxToolbox marked the lookup result as transitioned.

SPF_Subaction_Detail.description: The command-specific SPF subaction detail returned by MxToolbox.

Records.description: The raw records payload returned by MxToolbox for some commands.

IsEndpoint.description: Whether MxToolbox treated the target as an endpoint.

HasSubscriptions.description: Whether the authenticated account has subscriptions for this target.

AlertgroupSubscriptionId.description: The alert group subscription identifier returned by MxToolbox.

ID.description: The numeric identifier of the MxToolbox check item.

Info.description: The summary text returned by MxToolbox for the check.

Url.description: The MxToolbox documentation URL for this check item.

anyOf.description: The public description returned by MxToolbox for the check item.

AdditionalInfo.description: Additional detail lines returned by MxToolbox for this check item.

IsExcludedByUser.description: Whether this check item is excluded in the MxToolbox account.

BlacklistResponseTime.description: The blacklist response time returned by MxToolbox when available.

items.description: One failed, warning, passed, timeout, or error item returned by MxToolbox.

Failed.description: The failed checks returned by MxToolbox.

URL.description: The related lookup URL returned by MxToolbox.

Command.description: The related lookup command returned by MxToolbox.

CommandArgument.description: The argument that MxToolbox suggests for the related lookup.

actions.name: lookup_spf
actions.description: Look up the SPF record for a domain and return the official MxToolbox response payload.

domain.description: The bare domain whose SPF record should be looked up, such as `example.com`.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for running an SPF lookup with MxToolbox.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier for this lookup result.

ArgumentType.description: The type MxToolbox inferred for the lookup argument, such as domain or IP.

TimeToComplete.description: The lookup duration returned by MxToolbox, typically in milliseconds.

IsEndpoint.description: Whether MxToolbox treated the target as an endpoint.

actions.name: monitor_status
actions.description: Retrieve the current status of all monitors in the authenticated MxToolbox account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving MxToolbox monitor status.

MonitorUID.description: The unique identifier of the monitor.

ActionString.description: The monitor type and target returned by MxToolbox.

LastTransition.description: The timestamp when the monitor last changed state.

LastChecked.description: The timestamp when the monitor was last checked.

anyOf.description: The MX reputation score returned as a string.
The MX reputation score returned as a number.

MxRep.description: The MX reputation score returned by MxToolbox for the monitor.

items.description: One failing monitor detail returned by MxToolbox.

Failing.description: The failing monitor details returned by MxToolbox.

items.description: One warning detail returned by MxToolbox.

Warnings.description: The warning details returned by MxToolbox.

items.description: One monitor status item returned by MxToolbox.

details.description: The list of monitor status items returned by MxToolbox.

data.description: The monitor status data wrapper returned by MxToolbox.

anyOf.description: The error message returned by MxToolbox when monitor retrieval fails.

successfull.description: Whether MxToolbox marked the monitor status request as successful.

outputSchema.description: The official MxToolbox monitor status response payload.

actions.name: usage_check
actions.description: Retrieve API usage statistics for DNS and network lookups from MxToolbox.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving MxToolbox API usage statistics.

DnsRequests.description: The number of DNS lookup requests made in the current cycle.

DnsMax.description: The maximum number of DNS lookups allowed in the current cycle.

DnsOverageErrors.description: The number of DNS overage errors returned by MxToolbox.

NetworkRequests.description: The number of network requests made in the current cycle.

NetworkMax.description: The maximum number of network requests allowed in the current cycle.

NetworkOverageErrors.description: The number of network overage errors returned by MxToolbox.

outputSchema.description: The official MxToolbox usage response payload.
